entries.title: Demo Kit admin page.
entries.notes: Capture as an admin who can manage extensions, with the Insert example site data header action available. Opening the action modal is useful when the runner supports modal state.
entries.useCase: An administrator starts deterministic demo content generation from the package-owned admin page.

entries.title: Generated demo page content block.
entries.notes: Requires Demo Kit generated page data with a layout block using the demo-page-content renderable. Public output should show package Blade presentation, not stored Tailwind markup from database content.
entries.useCase: A maintainer verifies generated demo pages render designed content through the package-owned Blade view.

entries.title: Generated homepage section block.
entries.notes: Requires a generated homepage layout that includes a homepage-section renderable such as the command-centre hero block.
entries.useCase: A maintainer checks the generated homepage uses portable CMS data with presentation kept in package Blade.
